text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while on an outing with Mejiro Palmer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer points toward a claw machine filled
with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Aren't they just the cutest ever?! Oh! Never seen
that one before!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Helios and I actually play these claw machine
games a lot. We even snagged a BIG prize a while
ago.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Helios put it on her phone as a charm and then
got all mad 'cause it wouldn't fit in her bag! It was
hilarious!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
These plushies are a pretty good size, though. I
bet they'd look great hanging from my bag.
choice_data_list: I'll win you one so you can see how it looks!
I'll win you one so you can see how it looks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! You're just jumping at the chance to try,
aren'tcha?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm counting on you, then! Here, I'll even cheer for
you while you play!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
